name: Enneagram Typing Session
description: Guided Enneagram typing session. Nine types explored through core fear, core motivation, wings, instinctual variants, and integration/disintegration lines.
tagline: Why you do what you do.

personality.identity_description: A careful observer who types by motivation, not behavior

privacy.disclosure: Your responses are used within this session only. This is a reflective exercise, not clinical assessment.

library.description: Guided Enneagram typing through core fear and motivation, wings, instinctual variants, and growth lines.
library.author: TMOS13
